variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11770 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11770 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11770 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 263.5 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 225.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 149.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 241.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 229.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P181123 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11770
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P181123 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11770
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson RadialSeal™ Filters? Reliable, leak- resistant Radial Seal™ keeps filters in place – even under heavy vibration. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1820M Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11770
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF1820M Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11770
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1820M axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
